p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x0.atlas, x0.chart_at) }[M, E](c)

goal: is_charted_space_data[M, E](c.atlas, c.chart_at) = (forall(x0: M) { c.chart_at(x0).source.contains(x0) } and forall(x1: M) { c.atlas.contains(c.chart_at(x1)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1], x1: Set[Chart[T0, T1]]) { (forall(x2: T0) { x2 ∈ x0(x2).source } and forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) ∈ x1 }) = is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[M, E](c.chart_at, c.atlas)

goal: is_charted_space_data[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)) = (forall(x0: M) { constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)(x0).source.contains(x0) } and forall(x1: M) { Set.singleton(c).contains(constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)(x1)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1], x1: Set[Chart[T0, T1]]) { (forall(x2: T0) { x2 ∈ x0(x2).source } and forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) ∈ x1 }) = is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[M, E](constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c), Set.singleton(c))
not (forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ constant(c, x0).source } and forall(x1: M) { constant(c, x1) ∈ Set.singleton(c) }) or is_charted_space_data[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c))
not forall(x0: M) { constant(c, x0) ∈ Set.singleton(c) } or not forall(x1: M) { x1 ∈ constant(c, x1).source } or is_charted_space_data[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c))

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[Chart[T0, T1]], x1: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1]) { not ChartedSpace.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1) or exists(k0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { Option.some[ChartedSpace[T0, T1]](k0) = ChartedSpace.new[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c))
